package rulecoverage

func PositiveTimingAttackOnTokenComparison() string {
    ruleID := "timing_attack_on_token_comparison"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`token == expectedToken` or `bytes.Equal(token, expected)` for comparing authentication tokens, API keys, or HMAC values"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
